message:
fix: improve isNaN checks and tag scoring efficiency

Transcript utils:
- Replace global isNaN() with Number.isNaN() for type-safe NaN checks
- Affects formatTime() and formatDuration() functions
- Number.isNaN() doesn't coerce non-number values, preventing edge case bugs

Prompt metadata suggestions:
- Add tagCounts Map to track occurrence count during similarity scoring
- Use pre-computed counts in reason generation instead of re-filtering
- Eliminates O(n*m) filter operation in favor of O(1) Map lookup
- More accurate count since it uses normalized tags consistently

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
